name: Hajime Hinata(日向 創)
description:
!!!SPOILERS FOR THE KOMAEDA OVA AT THE END.!!

Hajime Hinata(日向 創) is a chracter in Super Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair(SDR2).
Hinata was a student in the Reserve Course program in Hope's Peak academy. He agreed to a project that promised to make him talented and no longer apart of the talentless Reserve Course, what he didn't realize was that the project was a ploy to get him to agree to human experimentation. He blindly sighed the contract and after the surgery, he was turned into Izuru Kamukura. A emotionless overpowered being with every single talent in the world made to be a weapon for absolute hope for the school. 

Junko Enoshima had manipulated Kamukura into agreeing to turn the world into despair and the world soon deteriorated until Izuru agreed to be rehabilitated by Mokoto Naegi only for him to plug in Enoshima's A.I into the rehabilitation program. After the program stopped, he woke up merged with Izuru as one being.
creator: Oliverrrr_Kat
